todos.content: Update test_demo/orchestrator.py to register new skill root under _outputs/weather_task_output/skills

Call web_agent once to: (a) fetch https://lobehub.com/skills/openclaw-openclaw-weather/skill.md and save to /_outputs/weather_task_output/skills/weather/SKILL.md; (b) using that SKILL.md, find the current weather for Colombo, Sri Lanka and save outputs under /_outputs/weather_task_output/ (e.g. weather_colombo.md and weather_colombo_raw.json) — specialist should return only paths + short summary
Call render_files once with every final path under /_outputs/weather_task_output so the user can view the files
